by store (for the entire period)\nstore_sales = sales_trans.groupby('store_id').agg(\n    total_units=('units_sold', 'sum'),\n    total_revenue=('revenue', 'sum')\n).reset_index()\n\n# Merge with store data\nstore_data = store_with_rep.merge(store_sales, on='store_id', how='left')\nstore_data['total_revenue'].fillna(0, inplace=True)\nstore_data['total_units'].fillna(0, inplace=True)\n\n# Add traffic data (average daily traffic)\ntraffic_agg = store_traffic.groupby('store_id')['customer_count'].agg(['mean', 'sum']).reset_index()\ntraffic_agg.columns = ['store_id', 'avg_daily_traffic', 'total_traffic']\nstore_data = store_data.merge(traffic_agg, on='store_id', how='left')\n\n# Add promotion data\npromo_agg = store_promotion.groupby('store_id').size().reset_index(name='num_promotions')\nstore_data = store_data.merge(promo_agg, on='store_id', how='left')\nstore_data['num_promotions'].fillna(0, 'sum'),\n    out_of_stock_count=('out_of_stock', 'sum')\n).reset_index()\nstore_data = store_data.merge(inv_agg, on='store_id', how='left')\n\n# One-hot encode store type and location\nstore_data = {feature_cols}\")\n\n# Filter rows with valid data for modeling\nmodel_data = store_data[store_data['total_revenue'] > 0].copy()\nmodel_data = Calculate per-rep performance\nrep_perf = model_data.groupby('primary_rep_id').agg(\n    num_stores=('store_id', 'count'),\n    total_actual_revenue=('total_revenue', 'sum'),\n    total_expected_revenue=('expected_revenue', 'sum'),\n    avg_revenue_ratio=('revenue_ratio', 'mean')\n).reset_index()\n\nrep_perf['performance_gap'] = rep_perf['total_actual_revenue'] - rep_perf['total_expected_revenue']\nrep_perf['performance_gap_pct'] = (rep_perf['total_actual_revenue'] - rep_perf['total_expected_revenue']) / rep_perf['total_expected_revenue'] * 100\n\nprint(f\"\\nRep performance (sorted by performance_gap_pct):\")\nrep_perf_sorted = rep_perf.sort_values('performance_gap_pct')\nprint(rep_perf_sorted[['primary_rep_id', 'num_stores', 'total_actual_revenue', 'total_expected_revenue', 'performance_gap_pct']].to_string())\n\n# Identify significantly underperforming reps\n# Use statistical approach: z-score of performance_gap_pct\nfrom scipy import stats\n\ngaps = rep_perf['performance_gap_pct'].values\nz_scores = stats.zscore(gaps)\nrep_perf['z_score'] = z_scores\n\n# Significantly underperforming: z-score < -1.5 (below 1.5 std from mean)\nthreshold = -1.5\nunderperformers = rep_perf[rep_perf['z_score'] < threshold].sort_values('primary_rep_id')\n\nprint(f\"\\n\\nUnderperforming reps (z_score < {threshold}):\")\nprint(underperformers[['primary_rep_id', 'num_stores', 'performance_gap_pct', 'z_score']].to_string())\n\n# Also try: absolute threshold of more than 30% below {len(store_data)}\")\nprint(f\"Stores with valid revenue: {store_data['total_revenue'].notna().sum()}\")\nprint(f\"Rev per sqm benchmark\nstore_data['store_size_bin'] = pd.qcut(store_data['store_size_sqm'], q=5, labels=False, duplicates='drop')\n\n# Expected revenue = average revenue of stores with same type and size store_data.merge(benchmark, on=['store_type', 'store_size_bin'], how='left')\nstore_data['performance_ratio'] = store_data['total_revenue'] / store_data['expected_rev']\n\nprint(f\"\\nPerformance 0].copy()\nmodel_df = model_df[model_df['rep_id'].notna()].copy()\n\n# Also use a Ridge regression for more robust prediction\nfeature_cols = ['store_size_sqm', 'total_traffic', 'num_promotions']\nstore_data_encoded = pd.get_dummies(model_df, columns=['store_type', 'location'], prefix=['type', 'loc'])\nfeature_cols += [c for c in store_data_encoded.columns if Standardize\nscaler = StandardScaler()\nX_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(X)\n\n# Ridge with cross-validated predictions\nkf = KFold(n_splits=5, shuffle=True, random_state=42)\nridge = RidgeCV(alphas=[0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000], cv=5)\ny_pred = cross_val_predict(ridge, X_scaled, y, cv=kf)\n\nmodel_df['ridge_expected'] = y_pred\nmodel_df['ridge_ratio'] = model_df['total_revenue'] / model_df.groupby('rep_id').agg(\n    stores=('store_id', 'count'),\n    actual=('total_revenue', 'sum'),\n    seg_expected=('expected_rev', 'sum'),\n).reset_index()\n\nrep_perf['seg_gap_pct'] = median of stores in same type x size_bin\nexpected = store_data.groupby(['store_type', 'size_bin']).agg(\n    exp_median_rev=('total_revenue', 'median'),\n    exp_mean_rev=('total_revenue', 'mean'),\n store_data[store_data['total_revenue'].notna() & store_data['total_revenue'] > 0].copy()\nmodel_df = model_df[model_df['rep_id'].notna()].copy()\n\n# Features: log_size, log_traffic, num_promotions, 'log_traffic', 'num_promotions']],\n    type_dummies,\n    loc_dummies\n], axis=1).fillna(0).replace([np.inf, -np.inf], 0).values\n\ny = model_df['log_revenue'].values\n\n# Cross-validated predictions\nkf = KFold(n_splits=5, shuffle=True, random_state=42)\nridge = RidgeCV(alphas=[0.01, 0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000])\ny_pred_log = cross_val_predict(ridge, X, y, cv=kf)\nmodel_df['pred_revenue'] perf_vs_median and pred_ratio\nmodel_df['combined_score'] = (model_df['perf_vs_median'] + model_df['pred_ratio']) / 2\n\n# Aggregate by rep\nrep_perf = model_df.groupby('rep_id').agg(\n    stores=('store_id', 'count'),\n    actual=('total_revenue', 'sum'),\n    vs_median=('perf_vs_median', 'mean'),\n    vs_mean=('perf_vs_mean', 'mean'),\n    pred_ratio=('pred_ratio', 'mean'),\n med_pred_ratio=('pred_ratio', 'median')\n).reset_index()\nrep_median['med_combined'] = (rep_median['med_vs_median'] + rep_median['med_pred_ratio']) / 2\nrep_median['med_z'] = stats.zscore(rep_median['med_combined'].fillna(1).values)\n\nprint(\"\\nTop 15 by median combined:\")\nprint(rep_median.sort_values('med_combined').head(15)[['rep_id', 'med_vs_median', 'med_pred_ratio', 'med_combined', 'med_z']].to_string())\n\n# Underperformers: z_score < -1.5 in combined score\nunder1 = rep_perf[(rep_perf['combined_z'] < -1.5)]\nunder2 = rep_median[(rep_median['med_z'] < -1.5)]\n\nfinal = sorted(set([int(x) for x in under1['rep_id'].values]) | set([int(x) for x in under2['rep_id'].values]))\nprint(f\"\\nCombined underperformers (z < -1.5): {final}\")\n\n# Also check: ratio < 0.8 in both metrics\nstrict = rep_perf[(rep_perf['vs_median'] < 0.8) & (rep_perf['pred_ratio'] < 0.8)]\nstrict_final = sorted([int(x) for x in store_promo.groupby('store_id').size().reset_index(name='num_promotions')\nstore_data = store_data.merge(promo_count, on='store_id', how='left')\nstore_data['num_promotions'] = store_data['num_promotions'].fillna(0)\n\nsales_list = []\nfor f in sorted(glob.glob(os.path.join(data_dir, 'sales_transaction_*.csv'))):\n    for chunk in pd.read_csv(f, usecols=['store_id', 'revenue'], chunksize=500000):\n        sales_list.append(chunk.groupby('store_id')['revenue'].sum())\nsales_agg = pd.concat(sales_list).groupby(level=0).sum().reset_index()\nsales_agg.columns = ['store_id', 'total_revenue']\nstore_data = store_data.merge(sales_agg, on='store_id', how='left')\n\nstore_data['size_bin'] = store_data.groupby('store_type')['store_size_sqm'].transform(\n    lambda x: pd.qcut(x, q=5, labels=False, duplicates='drop')\n)\n\nstore_data['log_revenue'] = np.log(store_data['total_revenue'] + 1)\nstore_data['log_size'] = np.log(store_data['store_size_sqm'] + 1)\nstore_data['log_traffic'] = np.log(store_data['total_traffic'] + 1)\n\n# Expected based on type x size segment\nseg_expected = store_data.groupby(['store_type', 'size_bin']).agg(\n    seg_median=('total_revenue', 'median'),\n    seg_mean=('total_revenue', 'mean'),\n).reset_index()\n\nstore_data = store_data.merge(seg_expected, on=['store_type', 'size_bin'], how='left')\nstore_data['seg_perf'] = store_data['total_revenue'] / store_data['seg_median']\n\nmodel_df = store_data[store_data['total_revenue'].notna() & store_data['total_revenue'] > 0].copy()\nmodel_df = model_df[model_df['rep_id'].notna()].copy()\n\ntype_dummies = pd.get_dummies(model_df['store_type'], prefix='type')\nloc_dummies = pd.get_dummies(model_df['location'], prefix='loc')\n\nX = pd.concat([\n    model_df[['log_size', 'log_traffic', 'num_promotions']],\n    type_dummies,\n    loc_dummies\n], axis=1).fillna(0).replace([np.inf, -np.inf], 0).values\n\ny = model_df['log_revenue'].values\n\nkf = KFold(n_splits=5, shuffle=True, random_state=42)\nridge = RidgeCV(alphas=[0.01, 0.1, 1, 10, 100])\ny_pred_log = cross_val_predict(ridge, X, y, cv=kf)\n\n# Fix: don't shadow np.exp\nimport math\nmodel_df['pred_revenue'] = np.exp(y_pred_log)\nmodel_df['pred_ratio'] = model_df['total_revenue'] / model_df['pred_revenue']\n\nprint(f\"Model pred_ratio stats:\\n{model_df['pred_ratio'].describe()}\")\n\n# Per rep aggregate using mean\nrep_mean = model_df.groupby('rep_id').agg(\n    stores=('store_id', 'count'),\n    actual=('total_revenue', 'sum'),\n    seg_perf_mean=('seg_perf', 'mean'),\n    pred_ratio_mean=('pred_ratio', 'mean'),\n    seg_perf_median=('seg_perf', 'median'),\n    pred_ratio_median=('pred_ratio', 'median')\n).reset_index()\n\n# Z scores\nfor c in ['seg_perf_mean', 'pred_ratio_mean', 'seg_perf_median', 'pred_ratio_median']:\n    rep_mean[f'{c}_z'] = stats.zscore(rep_mean[c].fillna(1).values)\n\nprint(\"\\nSorted by segment performance median:\")\nprint(rep_mean.sort_values('seg_perf_median')[['rep_id', 'stores', 'actual', 'seg_perf_median', 'seg_perf_median_z']].head(15).to_string())\n\nprint(\"\\nSorted by pred ratio median:\")\nprint(rep_mean.sort_values('pred_ratio_median')[['rep_id', 'stores', 'actual', 'pred_ratio_median', 'pred_ratio_median_z']].head(15).to_string())\n\n# Underperformers: z < -1.5 in either metric\nunder1 = rep_mean[(rep_mean['seg_perf_median_z'] < -1.5)]\nunder2 = rep_mean[(rep_mean['pred_ratio_median_z'] < -1.5)]\n# Keep if underperforming in BOTH\nboth_under = rep_mean[(rep_mean['seg_perf_median_z'] < -1.5) & (rep_mean['pred_ratio_median_z'] < -1.5)]\n\nprint(f\"\\nUnderperformers by seg_perf_median_z < -1.5: {sorted([int(x) for x in under1['rep_id'].values])}\")\nprint(f\"Underperformers by pred_ratio_median_z < -1.5: {sorted([int(x) for x in under2['rep_id'].values])}\")\nprint(f\"Underperformers in BOTH: {sorted([int(x) for x in both_under['rep_id'].values])}\")\n\n# Use union of both z < -1.0 (more inclusive but still statistically significant)\nunder_union = rep_mean[(rep_mean['seg_perf_median_z'] < -1.0) & (rep_mean['pred_ratio_median_z'] < -1.0)]\nfinal = sorted([int(x) for x in under_union['rep_id'].values])\nprint(f\"\\nFinal (both z < -1.0): {final}\")\n\n# OR z < -1.5 in either\neither = rep_mean[(rep_mean['seg_perf_median_z'] < -1.5) | (rep_mean['pred_ratio_median_z'] < -1.5)]\nfinal2 = sorted([int(x) for x in either['rep_id'].values])\nprint(f\"Either z < -1.5: {final2}\")\n\n# Best
